actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Rampage
bonus_actions.description: (1/Day). Immediately after dealing damage to a creature that was already Bloodied, the hyena can move up to half its Speed, and it makes one Bite attack.

tactical_info.combat_role: Striker - High mobility predator with rampage ability
tactical_info.positioning: Uses 50 ft speed to engage wounded targets
tactical_info.damage_output: 10 piercing per hit, bonus attack on bloodied enemies
tactical_info.key_abilities: Rampage allows hit-and-run tactics on wounded foes
tactical_info.weaknesses: Lower AC makes it vulnerable to focused fire
tactical_info.synergies: Works well with other creatures that can wound enemies first
